steps.title: Focus on the control problem
steps.content: The journalist claims that collective work can be difficult for artists who are used to sole control. The supporting quotation must show a problem with sharing control, credit, or responsibility.

steps.title: Compare the quotations
steps.content: The matching quotation says the collective failed because artists had a hard time sharing credit and responsibility. Choice B describes a responsibility system, Choice C says collective support helps expression, and Choice D concerns outside collaborators; none shows difficulty sharing control. The answer is A.
